task_title: Save the LibreOffice Impress presentation to the Desktop as pre.pptx

action_preconditions: The presentation "Secrets-of-Monetizing-Video.pptx" is open in LibreOffice Impress on its title slide, and no save dialog is visible yet.
steps.action_before_state: LibreOffice Impress is in normal editing view with the slide thumbnails on the left, the title slide selected, and the presentation canvas visible.
action_after_effects: The Save dialog is invoked for the presentation. Although the immediate captured frame shows little visible change, the window metadata and following step indicate that a save window opens.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Ctrl+Shift+S to open the Save As dialog for the presentation.

steps.step_goal: Switch the save location to the Desktop
action_preconditions: The LibreOffice Save dialog is open, currently showing the Downloads folder, with the existing presentation name in the Name field.

nl_position: the Desktop entry in the left sidebar of the Save dialog

steps.action_before_state: The Save dialog is focused on Downloads. The file list shows presentation files, and the Name field contains the current filename.
action_after_effects: Desktop becomes selected in the sidebar, and the main file list refreshes to show files on the Desktop while the Save dialog remains open.
steps.nl_explanation: Click Desktop in the Save dialog sidebar to change the destination folder to the Desktop.

action_preconditions: The Save dialog is open with Desktop selected, and the Name field is active for editing the output filename.
steps.action_before_state: The dialog remains on Desktop, and the Name field already shows a partial filename entry, "p".
action_after_effects: The filename field is updated to "pre" while the save location stays on Desktop and the rest of the dialog remains unchanged.
steps.nl_explanation: Type "pre" into the Name field to set the new filename.

action_preconditions: The Save dialog is still open on Desktop, with "pre" entered in the Name field and the Save button available.
steps.action_before_state: The save destination is Desktop, the Name field reads "pre", and the dialog is ready for confirmation.
action_after_effects: No visible change appears in the captured frame after pressing Enter. The Save dialog stays open with the same Desktop view and filename, so the keypress shows no immediate visible effect or the confirmation is not yet reflected.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Enter to confirm the filename and attempt the save, though no immediate visual change is visible in the capture.
